additionalFunding.name: UFS Chancellor's Scholarship
additionalFunding.criteria: Top matric achievers; APS 40+; all provinces

additionalFunding.name: UFS Sport Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: National colours; Kovsies varsity sport team member

additionalFunding.name: UFS Language Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: Students studying Sesotho, Afrikaans or isiZulu as major subject
